title: polygala leptostachys
intro: Polygala leptostachys, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family, native to China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, and anti-viral properties. The health benefits of Polygala leptostachys include improving sleep quality, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Polygala leptostachys is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be found in herbal supplements and capsules.
